## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `npm run pack` if this affects packaging, setup scripts, Electron config, or bundled files

## Privacy and Safety

- [ ] This change does not commit `.env`, auth/session folders, logs, screenshots, or other private local data.
- [ ] This change does not enable hidden monitoring, credential capture, session extraction, or unauthorized account access.
- [ ] User-facing documentation or warnings were updated if behavior changed.

## Notes

Add anything reviewers should know, including browser, WhatsApp Web, Telegram Web, or platform-specific caveats.
